description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a large, rectangular plot featuring manicured lawns, paved walkways, and a swimming pool adjacent to the property. The building itself has a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed across the facades, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The front of the bungalow is defined by a driveway and a landscaped entryway with several trees and shrubs. Outdoor seating areas and patios are visible, providing spaces for relaxation and entertainment. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on open spaces, straight lines, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped grounds, and a swimming pool, designed with clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the pool, main entry, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, emphasizing the driveway, main entrance, and symmetrical lawn layout.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, showcasing the pool area, backyard, and secondary outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the back facade, outdoor seating areas, and the full extent of the rear lawn and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
